intro: CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS is a boutique, modern and multidisciplinary law firm, made up of an associated team of legal professionals with distinguished academic and professional backgrounds.
intro2: We believe in the premise of providing personalized and professional legal advice of excellence, based on understanding the current needs of people and the business and commercial legal world.
intro3: With this approach and commitment, we provide effective legal solutions, in an agile, efficient manner, with a creative and comprehensive vision, and an innovative spirit; always acting in accordance with our principles, and the supreme value of Justice.
aviso_acceso: ACCESS TO AND USE OF OUR WEBSITE ARE SUBJECT TO THE FOLLOWING TERMS AND CONDITIONS, AND TO THE APPLICABLE LEGISLATION. BY ACCESSING AND/OR USING OUR SITE, YOU ACCEPT OUR TERMS AND CONDITIONS, WITHOUT LIMITATION OR CONDITION OF ANY KIND.

h_terminos: TERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS WEBSITE

aviso_legal: Access to and use of our website are subject to the following terms and conditions, and to the current legislation applicable in the Argentine Republic. No consideration will be given to where in the world the user is located, nor from where in the world they are accessing and/or using our website; for all cases in which controversies may eventually arise, the legislation of the Argentine Republic, and no other, shall apply.
aviso_legal2: Access to and use of the CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS website implies not only acknowledging but also full and irrevocable adherence and acceptance of these Terms and Conditions, which govern the rights and obligations between the parties. By accessing and/or using our website, you accept our terms and conditions, without limitation or condition of any kind.
registro: The web domain www.cacciatoreabogados.com.ar is duly registered with the National Directorate for Internet Domain Registration (NIC Argentina / Nic.ar), an organization that operates under the National Secretariat for Legal and Technical Affairs. Said entity is responsible for the registration of domain names and ensuring the functioning of the DNS (Domain Name System) for the Geographic Top-Level Domain ".ar"
contenido: On our website we publish graphic-visual, audio-visual and/or text format content, which is hosted there for informational purposes only. CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS does not guarantee that said publications are complete and/or up to date, since they refer to general information that cannot be applied to a particular case, nor do they constitute legal advice or professional legal counseling.
contenido2: If you have any questions or concerns, please contact us at cacciatorehoracio@gmail.com
propiedad: Unless we establish a provision to the contrary, all content published on our website, of whatever type or format: visual, audiovisual, graphic, images, texts, data, illustrative non-contractual images, flyers, brochures, photographs, audio and video content, streaming content, clips, logos, icons, social media profiles or files, and/or in any other format, both its arrangement and ownership belong to CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS.

destinatarios: Considering that the Terms and Conditions represent a contract between the parties called "user" on one hand, and "website owner" on the other, and with full and irrevocable acceptance by the user of these terms and conditions from the moment they expressly give their consent by accessing and using the CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS website, it shall also be considered that the user will have accepted and recognized Argentine Republic legislation (specifically the legislation of the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires) as the only applicable legislation to govern any controversies that may eventually arise between the parties, regardless of where in the world the user is located or from where they are accessing and/or using our website.
privacidad: The collection of personal data from users that we may eventually carry out from the contact form of our website will only be done when strictly necessary. In matters of data privacy, the current legislation of the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires, Argentine Republic and our PRIVACY POLICY shall apply, which may be constantly consulted at the bottom of our website, in the "Legal" section. The data subject has the right to access their data free of charge at intervals of no less than six months, unless a legitimate interest is accredited in accordance with article 14, paragraph 3 of Law No. 25.326. The National Directorate for the Protection of Personal Data, Control Body of Law No. 25.326, has the authority to attend to complaints and claims filed in relation to non-compliance with personal data protection regulations.
h_cibercrimen: Cybercrime. Damages and violations against the operating system, servers, website, networks, social media profiles and email accounts of Cacciatore & Cacciatore
cibercrimen1: No action or use of device, software, or other technological or conventional means is permitted that tends to cause damage or interfere with the activities and operations of CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS, as well as the normal functioning of our website, our email accounts, accounts or social media profiles or databases that our firm may own or manage.
cibercrimen2: Any intrusion, attempt or activity that violates or is contrary to laws in force in the Argentine Republic regarding intellectual property law, copyright law, criminal law, civil and commercial law, and/or any other branch of Argentine law, and/or any other violation or non-compliance with the terms and conditions stipulated in this contract shall make its responsible party liable for the relevant legal actions, and the sanctions provided for in this agreement, as well as making them liable to compensate for damages and losses caused, and the eventual initiation of corresponding criminal proceedings for crimes committed.
cibercrimen3: It is strictly prohibited for users of the CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS website to violate, compromise and/or in any way affect the normal use and security of the site, including but not limited to: a) accessing data not intended for that user or entering an account to which the user is not authorized to access; b) attempting to probe, analyze or test the vulnerability of our system or network, or breaking our security measures or authentications without proper authorization; c) attempting to interfere with our operations, including, without the following enumeration implying limitation, when done through sending a virus or trojan to our website or email accounts, or causing overload, flooding, mass sending of unsolicited messages ("spamming") sending destructive codes ("mailbombing") or cancellation of software instructions ("crashing"). Violations of system security, the website, social media profiles, the internet network, or the email accounts of CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS may give rise to civil or criminal liability, and the initiation of the corresponding legal actions.

fallas1: CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS is not responsible for any damage, loss or harm to the user caused by the latter's access to our website and/or links to third-party websites, platforms or applications from our site.
fallas2: CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS shall also not be responsible for any virus that may infect the user's equipment as a result of access, use or examination of our website or as a result of any transfer of data, files, images, texts, or audio content on it.
fallas3: Users may not hold CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS liable, nor demand payment for direct damages, lost profits, or any other item by virtue of losses resulting from technical difficulties or system or Internet failures.
fallas4: CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS does not guarantee continuous or uninterrupted access to and use of its site. The system may eventually not be available due to technical difficulties or Internet failures, or any other circumstance beyond CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS's control. In such cases, it will be restored as quickly as possible without any type of liability being attributed to it. reserva: CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS shall not, under any circumstances, assume any liability to users or third parties, for any direct or indirect, incidental or casual damage, lost profits, loss of chance or benefits, business interruption, loss of programs or data, and/or any other type of damage, whether arising from contractual, non-contractual liability or negligence, that may eventually arise from access to and use of this website.
h_jurisdiccion: Jurisdiction and Applicable Law for the case of controversies
jurisdiccion1: As stated in previous sections, this agreement shall be governed in all its terms and conditions by the laws in force in the Argentine Republic.
jurisdiccion2: This agreement shall be governed and interpreted in good faith, in accordance with the laws of the Argentine Republic, where all disputes under this agreement shall be resolved in the Ordinary Commercial Courts of the Autonomous City of Buenos Aires, Argentine Republic, with waiver of any other jurisdiction by the user.
jurisdiccion3: The terms and conditions of use that represent this agreement between the parties supersede all previous agreements that may exist between them. The titles used in these conditions of use are for reference purposes only and in no way define or limit the scope of the provision they title.
jurisdiccion4: If any provision of the same is considered inapplicable for any reason, cause or circumstance, such provision shall be reformed only to the extent necessary to make it enforceable and the other conditions of this Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.
jurisdiccion5: The inaction of CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS with respect to a breach of this agreement by a user of its website does not constitute a waiver of its rights and shall not limit the rights of CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS with respect to such breach or subsequent infractions.
jurisdiccion6: CACCIATORE & CACCIATORE ABOGADOS reserves the right to modify these terms and conditions without prior notice, in accordance with business needs or technological advances that may arise, without this entailing any type of liability with respect to the users of this website and/or any other third party.
